productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Blue Shirts
description: CompositionBlue patterned shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, and a patch pocket on the left chestFittingRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron directly on decorationThis easy-to-wear shirt from United Colours of Benetton adds a touch of fun and playfulness to your wardrobe.
